reasoning: Eminem's catalog streams, while impressive and consistently placing him in the global top 20, are significantly lower than those of the current top contenders like Taylor Swift, The Weeknd, Drake, and Bad Bunny. Taylor Swift's daily streams often double or triple Eminem's. Eminem also released a new album in 2024 ("The Death of Slim Shady"), which makes another major, record-breaking album release in 2025 unlikely. Given the astronomical streaming numbers required to be the #1 global artist for an entire year (e.g., Taylor Swift's 26+ billion streams in 2023), it is highly improbable that Eminem will close this gap.
